name: coding-telemetry-feedback-net
description: Offline neural network code critic v2 — analyzes Python code quality using a code-aware transformer with 465-token vocabulary. Trained on 5000 labeled samples. Detects bugs, style, performance, security, maintainability, and pythonic issues. Runs 100% locally.
author: AGNT User

schema.title: Code Critic v2
schema.description: Analyze Python code quality using a local neural network with code-aware tokenization. Returns quality score, categorized issues (bugs/style/perf/security/maintainability/pythonic), refactoring suggestions, and positive notes. Runs 100% offline.

filePath.description: Optional file path for context-aware analysis

telemetry.description: Optional JSON telemetry: git diffs, edit counts, file age, etc.
